data.body: PASS 1 (T8 LLM/prompt structural-completeness overlay): CLEAN — no findings. This is a documentation-only ticket that DOCUMENTS existing machinery rather than defining a new LLM/agent system. All referenced enums/protocols/symbols are existing, fully-specified source constructs (verified): the `certified|mismatch|foreign_key|unsigned` verdict vocabulary is defined in src/rebar/signing.py and src/rebar/schemas/verify_signature_result.schema.json (enum); `sign_manifest` exists at src/rebar/signing.py:319; `resolve_prompt` at src/rebar/llm/prompts.py:648. AC line "Each documented signature/return shape is verified against the current source (no drift)" already closes the drift/co-location concern. No undefined-but-referenced enum, no ambiguous counter/state, no missing sub-step fallback, no instruction-locality antipattern.
